violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and water rust. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service, and bagged ice purchased. Bagged ice will be used until the ice machine has been professionally serviced per Administrator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Tray delivery carts were not in good repair, with plastic on the inner door broken with pieces missing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The kitchen ceiling is in poor repair, with paint on the ceiling and in the skylights chipped and peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
One light bulb beneath the hood was burned out. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
The walk in door has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
